emails.subject: Natural Gas Pricing
emails.body: Natural Gas Pricing Jon Please price the following volumes out of Oct 01 GJ/month Oct 245 Nov 388 Dec 396 Jan 446 Feb 299 Mar 281 April 201 May 114 June 86 July 69 August 76 Sept 122 2723 3 yr 5 yr Thanks Kate

emails.subject: RE: Natural Gas Pricing
emails.body: RE: Natural Gas Pricing 3 Year 4.72 5 Year 4.81 Cheers.... To: Mckay, Jonathan

emails.subject: RE: Natural Gas Pricing
emails.body: how long are you comfortable keeping these prices open? To: Joslyn, Kate

emails.subject: RE: Natural Gas Pricing
emails.body: The sooner I know the better, but as always, good till one o'clock. To: Mckay, Jonathan

emails.subject: RE: Natural Gas Pricing
emails.body: McKay we have closed this deal (5yrs out of Oct 01). We will complete the risk mgmt spreadsheet shortly. KJ To: Joslyn, Kate

emails.subject: RE: Natural Gas Pricing
emails.body: Thanks Jon. I have used Fridays prices with a large margin for the latest indicative prices that I needed (Oct 01, Nov 01 3 yrs). Disturnal said that prices were off throughout the curves from Friday. KJ
